🔄 MCP Registry Version Sync — Playground

chore/mcp-registry-version-automation · kills the last hand-bumped version surface (server.json) + manual mcp-publisher runs

Simulate a release

Version surfaces @ 8.36.1

SurfaceGoverned byState
version.txt / package.jsonrelease-please8.36.1 ✅
marketplace.json / plugin.jsonrelease-please8.36.1 ✅
manifests/ork.json → live /api/mcprelease-please + Vercel8.36.1 ✅
pyproject.toml / CLAUDE.mdrelease-please8.36.1 ✅
server.json → MCP registryhand-bumped (was)8.35.0 ❌ stale

⚠️ orank's bi-directional check compares registry version vs live serverInfo.version — drift costs score.

What this PR changes

FileChange
.release-please-config.json+ server.json $.version extra-file
server.json8.35.0 → 8.36.1 (one-time catch-up)
release.yml+ publish-mcp-registry job on tag push: verify version == tag → install mcp-publisher v1.7.9 (sha256-pinned) → OIDC login → publish

🔐 Auth = GitHub OIDC (io.github.yonatangross namespace) — no long-lived secrets.
